summary: Complete testing of 4 user-reported bug fixes: Search panel now finds new landing pages, footer links navigate correctly, Book Tee Times has redesigned course cards with 'Book a Tee Time' buttons and thumbnails, and hero backgrounds use brand-charcoal (dark grey) instead of black. All 12 test scenarios passed.

search_api_tests.golf_holidays_search: PASS - Search 'golf holidays' returns Golf Holidays page with 'page' type badge
search_api_tests.book_tee_times_search: PASS - Search 'book tee times' returns Book Tee Times page with 'page' type badge
search_api_tests.packages_search: PASS - Search 'packages' returns Golf Holidays page (matched by keywords)
search_api_tests.page_result_structure: PASS - Page results have correct fields: id, type, name, location, booking_url, category='page'

search_navigation_tests.golf_holidays_click: PASS - Clicking 'Golf Holidays in Mallorca' page result navigates to /golf-holidays-mallorca (internal navigation, not external tab)
search_navigation_tests.book_tee_times_click: PASS - Clicking 'Book Tee Times in Mallorca' page result navigates to /book-tee-times (internal navigation, not external tab)

footer_navigation_tests.golf_holidays_link: PASS - Footer 'Golf Holidays' link navigates to /golf-holidays-mallorca
footer_navigation_tests.book_tee_times_link: PASS - Footer 'Book Tee Times' link navigates to /book-tee-times
footer_navigation_tests.home_navigation: PASS - Footer 'Home' button navigates from landing pages back to homepage (/#hero)

book_tee_times_redesign.course_cards_count: PASS - 16 course cards displayed in price grid
book_tee_times_redesign.thumbnails: PASS - Each course card has a thumbnail image
book_tee_times_redesign.book_buttons: PASS - Each course card has 'Book a Tee Time' button
book_tee_times_redesign.course_info: PASS - Cards show course name, location, holes, par, and price

passed_tests: Search 'golf holidays' returns Golf Holidays page result with 'page' badge
Search 'book tee times' returns Book Tee Times page result with 'page' badge
Search 'packages' returns Golf Holidays page (keyword match)
Clicking page search result navigates to internal page (not external tab)
Footer 'Book Tee Times' link navigates to /book-tee-times
Footer 'Home' button navigates back to homepage from landing pages
/book-tee-times hero uses brand-charcoal (dark grey), not black
/golf-holidays-mallorca hero uses brand-charcoal (dark grey), not black
Book Tee Times page has 16 course cards with thumbnails
Each course card has 'Book a Tee Time' button
Course cards show name, location, holes, par, and price
critical_code_review_comments: Search API (server.py ~5046-5091) correctly returns static page results with type='page' and booking_url as internal path
FloatingSearch.jsx correctly uses useNavigate for internal page navigation (type='page') vs window.open for external links
Footer.jsx correctly uses Link component for landing page links (/golf-holidays-mallorca, /book-tee-times)
BookTeeTimesPage.jsx uses bg-brand-charcoal (not bg-black or bg-stone-900) for hero and CTA sections
GolfHolidaysPage.jsx uses bg-brand-charcoal for hero and CTA sections
Book Tee Times page green fees section uses responsive grid with course thumbnail cards, not plain table
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Search API returns static page results for Golf Holidays and Book Tee Times landing pages - keywords include 'golf holidays', 'book tee times', 'packages'. 2) FloatingSearch uses navigate() for page type results (internal) vs window.open for external. 3) Footer has Link components for both landing pages. 4) Both landing pages use bg-brand-charcoal (#4A4A4A) for hero/CTA sections. 5) Book Tee Times has 16 course cards with thumbnails, info, and 'Book a Tee Time' buttons.
